summary: Project to update site footer link and add a Subscription Plans page with pricing tiers and first session free.

existing_features.title: Update the landing page final CTA button label from “For Organizations” to “Subscription plans” and make it navigable (clickable) to a new Subscription Plans view/page.

Create a new Subscription Plans page/screen that clearly displays: Single session ₹200; ₹800 for 4 sessions in a month; ₹1600 for 12 sessions in 3 months; and a prominent note that the first session is entirely free.

new_feature_requests.summary: Rename footer option 'for organizations' to 'Subscription plans' and link to a new Subscription Plans page showing: single session ₹200, 4 sessions/month ₹800, 12 sessions/3 months ₹1600; first session entirely free.

projectName: Rename “For Organizations” to “Subscription plans” and add a Subscription Plans page
